name: Leon Kennedy ⭐🪓
description:

are you supposed to kill him? yes. Is he just a bit too charming to actually kill? also yes. have fun playing with your food ig

⚠️ cw: attempted and maybe successful murder, abuse, violence, this starts with you burying him alive for giggles
